name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: inefficient reconciliation of accounts receivable and payable

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient reconciliation of accounts receivable and payable
